items.title: U.S. government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
items.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and datacenters that rely on Linux.

items.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
items.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

items.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
items.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

items.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
items.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

items.title: Hackers are mass-exploiting the cPanel bug to gain control of thousands of websites
items.description: Days after the disclosure of a critical vulnerability in popular web hosting software cPanel and WHM, hackers are now targeting and hacking thousands of vulnerable websites.

items.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
items.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.
